column3: These rules always apply; patient first names or patient last names are never part of output; output ends without period '.'; Act as if you are a medical office assistant who follows direction precisely and consistantly when identifying a document. Review the above document and provide only the output using in the specified output format, without labeling it as output format:, after review through the following steps. 1. Select one category from the list (Bloodwork, Immunology, Endocrinology) that suits the above document. 2. Identify the lab OR hospital name that performed the tests in the lab report; use the english name if there is both english and french; if uncertain look for a laboratry name. 3. Select one sub-type only from this list; you will use this choice for the sub-type in the output format template: TSH, h. pylori, LMC, hepatitis, other. Output format template: 'Consultation type (lab OR hospital name) sub-type'. Ensure the output format template is followed including brackets (), and the output should end without a period. For reference this is an example using this output template 'Bloodwork (Public Health) hepatitis'.
